domains.name: Bootstrapping a Google Cloud organization for DevOps

questions.text: You are preparing for Google Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer and reviewing Bootstrapping a Google Cloud organization for DevOps. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use PCDO exam guide and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: You are preparing for Google Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer and reviewing Building and implementing CI/CD pipelines. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use Artifact Registry and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: You are preparing for Google Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer and reviewing Implementing service monitoring strategies. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use Cloud Monitoring and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: You are preparing for Google Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer and reviewing Optimizing service performance and cost. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use Cost optimization and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: A regulated workload requires the organization to build containers in CI. Which solution is BEST?
A hybrid environment must support a goal to scan artifacts in Cloud Build without changing application code. What should you implement?
Which Google Cloud service should you use to build containers in CI?
What is the recommended Google Cloud solution to build containers in CI?

What is the recommended Google Cloud solution to scan artifacts in Cloud Build?

Your startup is building on Google Cloud and needs to build containers in CI.
For cost-aware operations, you should scan artifacts in Cloud Build.
A cloud engineer needs to build containers in CI.
A data team must scan artifacts in Cloud Build.

Two designs were proposed. Design A would build containers in CI. Design B would scan artifacts in Cloud Build. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?
questions.explanation: Cloud Build executes build steps. Compare with Binary Authorization or vulnerability scanning: Scanning gates risky deployments.

questions.text: Two designs were proposed. Design A would scan artifacts in Cloud Build. Design B would build containers in CI. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?
questions.explanation: Scanning gates risky deployments. Compare with Cloud Build: Cloud Build executes build steps.

questions.text: For cost and security, the team must store build artifacts. What is the recommended approach?
